dashboard.sidebar: hidden md:block col-span-2 h-screen sticky top-0 border-r border-white/5
dashboard.card_style: bg-[#1A1D25] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Animated gradient border for 'Analysis' sections. Use framer-motion layoutId
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Overlay a 5% opacity noise image on the background to kill digital flatness

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-surface border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden relative group

inputs.style: bg-[#0F1117] border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-lg h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/20 transition-all

hero_main.alt: Student focused on laptop in dark environment
hero_main.usage: Hero section main visual, potentially with a gradient fade at bottom

abstract_bg.usage: Background overlay for 'AI Analysis' section or footer

feature_setup.usage: Context image for 'Manual Entry' or 'Career Path' section

setup: Install dependencies: yarn add lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot
Ensure tailwind.config.js extends colors with the palette provided above.
implementation_order: 1. Setup Fonts & Global Colors in index.css
3. Build Landing Page (Hero + Bento Grid Features)
anti_patterns: DO NOT center text by default. Use left alignment for 90% of content.
DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid dark colors + subtle noise or radial glows.
DO NOT use generic 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Outfit'.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratio > 4.5:1. Use lighter grays (text-slate-300) for body text on dark backgrounds.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
